The stainless steel straw contains a powerful membrane microfilter, which removes bacteria (e.g., E. coli, Salmonella), parasites (e.g., Giardia, Cryptosporidium), and microplastics with 99.999999% efficiency. It also removes fine sediment and particles. It improves water clarity through mechanical filtration (0.2µm micropores), works entirely without chemicals, and preserves the natural taste and minerals in the water. It stands out with a length of just 25cm and a lightweight design, so it fits in any purse or backpack. The materials used do not affect the taste of the drink, and the straw is BPA-free. The filter has a lifespan of up to 1,000 liters; once this limit is reached, it naturally clogs. The package includes a silicone storage case, ideal for travel. Nafukovací podlaha s I-nosníkem zpevňuje celý člun, zatímco 3 vzduchové komory včetně vnitřní bezpečnostní komory zajišťují vyšší jistotu na vodě.
